summary_id: Sengketa antara komunitas adat Yei dan pemegang izin terkait food estate di Papua Selatan. Status: litigasi.
summary_en: Dispute between the Yei indigenous community and permit holders over food estate in Papua Selatan. Status: litigasi.
mitigation_id: Audit independen atas legalitas izin dan kepatuhan administrasi sesuai PP 23/2021.
mitigation_en: Conduct independent socio-ecological impact assessment before further operations.

title_id: Proyek Strategis Nasional di Kalimantan Utara — Komunitas Punan Tubu
title_en: National Strategic Project in Kalimantan Utara — Punan Tubu Community
summary_id: Sengketa antara komunitas adat Punan Tubu dan pemegang izin terkait psn di Kalimantan Utara. Status: mediasi.
summary_en: Dispute between the Punan Tubu indigenous community and permit holders over national strategic project in Kalimantan Utara. Status: mediasi.
mitigation_id: Dampingi komunitas menyiapkan paket bukti hukum dan surat keberatan resmi.
mitigation_en: Conduct FPIC (Free, Prior, Informed Consent) with affected indigenous communities.

title_id: Perubahan RTRW di Nusa Tenggara Timur — Komunitas Atoni Meto
title_en: Spatial plan revision in Nusa Tenggara Timur — Atoni Meto Community
summary_id: Sengketa antara komunitas adat Atoni Meto dan pemegang izin terkait infrastruktur di Nusa Tenggara Timur. Status: deeskalasi.
summary_en: Dispute between the Atoni Meto indigenous community and permit holders over infrastructure in Nusa Tenggara Timur. Status: deeskalasi.
mitigation_id: Dorong dialog multi-pihak yang dimediasi Komnas HAM atau pemerintah daerah.
mitigation_en: Verify permit legality against provincial and regency spatial plans.

title_id: Tumpang tindih dengan hutan lindung di DI Yogyakarta — Komunitas Adat Mataraman
title_en: Protected forest overlap in DI Yogyakarta — Adat Mataraman Community
summary_id: Sengketa antara komunitas adat Adat Mataraman dan pemegang izin terkait hutan lindung di DI Yogyakarta. Status: mediasi.
summary_en: Dispute between the Adat Mataraman indigenous community and permit holders over protected forest in DI Yogyakarta. Status: mediasi.
mitigation_id: Dorong dialog multi-pihak yang dimediasi Komnas HAM atau pemerintah daerah.
mitigation_en: Initiate participatory mapping of customary boundaries as a basis for negotiation.

title_id: Konsesi HTI di Sulawesi Utara — Komunitas Bolaang Mongondow
title_en: Industrial plantation concession in Sulawesi Utara — Bolaang Mongondow Community
summary_id: Sengketa antara komunitas adat Bolaang Mongondow dan pemegang izin terkait hti di Sulawesi Utara. Status: litigasi.
summary_en: Dispute between the Bolaang Mongondow indigenous community and permit holders over industrial plantation in Sulawesi Utara. Status: litigasi.
mitigation_id: Dampingi komunitas menyiapkan paket bukti hukum dan surat keberatan resmi.
mitigation_en: Coordinate with KLHK & ATR/BPN for a boundary re-examination.

title_id: Proyek Strategis Nasional di Nusa Tenggara Timur — Komunitas Helong
title_en: National Strategic Project in Nusa Tenggara Timur — Helong Community
summary_id: Sengketa antara komunitas adat Helong dan pemegang izin terkait psn di Nusa Tenggara Timur. Status: deeskalasi.
summary_en: Dispute between the Helong indigenous community and permit holders over national strategic project in Nusa Tenggara Timur. Status: deeskalasi.
mitigation_id: Lakukan konsultasi FPIC (Free, Prior, Informed Consent) dengan komunitas adat terdampak.
mitigation_en: Verify permit legality against provincial and regency spatial plans.

title_id: Ekspansi sawit di Sulawesi Tenggara — Komunitas Bajo Sampela
title_en: Palm oil expansion in Sulawesi Tenggara — Bajo Sampela Community
summary_id: Sengketa antara komunitas adat Bajo Sampela dan pemegang izin terkait sawit di Sulawesi Tenggara. Status: litigasi.
summary_en: Dispute between the Bajo Sampela indigenous community and permit holders over palm oil in Sulawesi Tenggara. Status: litigasi.
mitigation_id: Inisiasi pemetaan partisipatif batas wilayah adat sebagai dasar negosiasi.
mitigation_en: Propose a moratorium on new permits in overlap zones until verification completes.

title_id: Pengembangan Food Estate di Kalimantan Utara — Komunitas Punan Tubu

summary_id: Sengketa antara komunitas adat Punan Tubu dan pemegang izin terkait food estate di Kalimantan Utara. Status: litigasi.

mitigation_id: Verifikasi legalitas dokumen perizinan terhadap RTRW provinsi dan kabupaten.
mitigation_en: Push multi-stakeholder dialogue mediated by Komnas HAM or local government.
